MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Joe R. McCray, Esq. 775-3900 for pltf & moving party; Sandra Benson, Esq. & Andrea Laiacona, Esq. 510/839-6600 for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court denied the preliminary injunction; request for attorney fees denied; motion for records denied without prejudice to bring to discovery dept. Ms. Benson to prepare order (Mr. McCray may submit own order if any objections). Court reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193.
